skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
stem: A certain forest has an area of 24,780,800 square yards. What is the area, in square miles, of this forest? (1 mile = 1,760 yards)
rationale: 1 square mile = (1,760)² = 3,097,600 square yards. So area in square miles = 24,780,800 / 3,097,600 = 8.00 square miles. Choice (c) is correct.
